characters.name: Accordion Worm
characters.description: Accordion WormInfoSpeciesAccordion/worm hybrid chalk drawingGenderMaleOccupationInstrumentResidenceChalkzoneBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance"The Wiggies"AnAccordion Wormis one ofChalkZone's fauna. It is a cross between a worm and an accordion, and first appeared inThe Wiggies. It makes minor appearances throughout the series.

characters.name: Balloonemia epidemic
characters.description: TheBalloonemia epidemicis a plague thatChalkZoneinhabitants suffered from at least twice. It is spread by tiny red bats who infect chalk drawings by biting them. Once one is infected, they will rapidly inflate until their bodies eventually burst. Humans cannot be infected by Balloonemia, asRudy Tabootiewas bit by the bats, but did not inflate. ChalkZone suffered from Balloonemia the second time in The Big Blow Up. Little is known about the first Balloonemia epidemic except thatKing Mumbo Jumbotamed the bats with his flute before sealing himself and the bats away in his Forbidden Temple, where they rested until the temple was reopened by Rudy,Penny Sanchez, andSnap. WhileBiclopsknew of Balloonemia, the only known characters in the present day who experienced the first epidemic are King Mumbo Jumbo andBarney the Encyclocentipedia. After Rudy drew a dome to trap the red bats in the temple, he, Penny, and King Mumbo Jumbo got the cure in a giant soda, and everyone who had been infected drank it and got better.

characters.name: Barney the Encyclocentipedia
characters.description: Barney, the Encyclocentipedia Barney the EncyclocentipediaInfoSpeciesChalk DrawingGenderMaleOccupationNoneInterestsReading, solitude,  King Mumbo JumboResidenceBarney's Impenetrable ForestBehind the ScenesFirst AppearanceThe Big BlowupLast AppearanceThe Big BlowupVoiceMalcolm McDowell Barney the Encyclocentipedia,voiced byMalcolm McDowell, is a centipede who knows the entire history ofChalkZone. He is good friends withKing Mumbo Jumbo, who sealed himself away in his Forbidden Temple for 300 years in order to stop aBalloonemia epidemic. Barney's body consists of multiple segments which, like a computerized encyclopedia, keeps an alphabetized record of ChalkZone and its history and inhabitants. Believing his encyclopedic knowledge ultimately doomed King Mumbo Jumbo, Barney holds that providing information will always backfire. Thus, Barney will often assert: "Knowledge is power, power is pain. If you don't understand, I won't try to explain." Barney, after constantly being sought after for trivial information, has become very unwelcoming towards others. He is stubborn and clearly does not enjoy the company of those who merely want information, and is quick to brush them off. Being the Encyclocentipedia, Barney is incredibly intelligent, and knows just about everything there is to know about ChalkZone, its history, and its inhabitants, all in alphabetical order. Despite his rejection towards others, and his intelligence, Barney is a good man in general. He hates those who demand unimportant information from him, however once he realizes that there is an actual, serious problem that does require his assistance, he becomes more willing to help. Barney also cares deeply for his friends. He felt great guilt for the supposed doom of King Mumbo Jumbo, his best friend, after he told him that the only solution to rid ChalkZone of the red bats was to seal himself into the temple by distracting the bats with a flute. He cries upon hearing King Mumbo Jumbo's name, and hugs him when the two are reunited. Barney can separate himself from his Barney-Pods, but once he is separated from them he quickly becomes a babbling moron, rambling incoherent nonsense, and acting as nothing but a nuisance for the other characters. The only way to snap him out of it is to reattach his Barney-Pods. Even just one will reinstate his normal behavior. However, his realm of knowledge regarding the history or the areas of ChalkZone is limited to whatever pods he reattaches.

characters.name: Bathtub Granny
characters.description: Bathtub Grannyis one ofRudy's earliest humorous creations. Granny is shown to be an elderly woman, wearing a pink shower cap, and glasses. As it was indicated that because she was drawn in a bath, she is completely naked, with only her head shown. However inThe Pilotshe is briefly seen out of the tub while wearing a pink towel as upon seeingBully Nerdfalling into it.

characters.name: Biclops
characters.description: BiclopsInfoSpeciesZonerGenderMaleOccupationGuardian of the Chalk MineInterestsExercisingResidenceThe Chalk MineBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance"The Amazin' River"Last Appearance"Mine Alone" (produced)ChalkZone: The Movie(scrapped)VoiceRodger Bumpass Biclopsis a giant chalk being who guards theMagic Chalk Mine. He was originally a villain with a single eye namedCyclops(or"Cy"for short), but was given an extra eye byRudy Tabootie. He has the ability to display images and videos using his original eye as a television screen. Biclops issomewhat strict, threatening to ban Rudy fromChalkZoneif he does something irresponsible or puts ChalkZone in danger. He is very cautious about allowing people into ChalkZone, and protective of the Magic Chalk Mine. Despite this, he is also quite friendly and reasonable. Biclops issomewhat strict, threatening to ban Rudy fromChalkZoneif he does something irresponsible or puts ChalkZone in danger. He is very cautious about allowing people into ChalkZone, and protective of the Magic Chalk Mine. Despite this, he is also quite friendly and reasonable.

characters.name: Bobby Sue
characters.description: Bobby Sue is a little girl whoRudy Tabootiemeets and develops a small crush in the episode "My Big Fat Chalk Wedding". She was voiced by Debi Derryberry. Bobby Sue is 6 years old. She has red hair (in pigtails) and green eyes. she wears a lavender dress, white socks and grey shoes that look similar to Rudy's.

characters.name: Boorat
characters.description: Booratis a minor villain onChalkZone, who only appeared in the episode "Snap vs. Boorat". It tried to getRudy'sMagic Chalk, but the plan failed. Boorat was jointly created byTerry BouffantandVinnie Raton, and is essentially a combination of the two in rat form, as Boorat speaks with both Terry and Vinnie's voices simultaneously, in addition to having Terry's signature hairdo. It is unknown what happened to it after the events of the episode.

characters.name: Boorat
characters.description: Booratis a minor villain onChalkZone, who only appeared in the episode "Snap vs. Boorat". It tried to getRudy'sMagic Chalk, but the plan failed. characters.name: Terry Bouffant
characters.description: Terry BouffantInfoSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleOccupationTelevision reporterResidencePlainvilleBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance"The Wiggies" Terry Bouffantis a news reporter and minor villain inChalkZone. She tried to expose the existence ofChalkZoneto the world, but she failed. Terry later teamed up withVinnie Ratonand createdBooratto stealRudy Tabootie'sMagic Chalkin "Snap vs. Boorat", which also reveals that Terry had been stalking Rudy andPenny Sanchezfor months. In her first appearance "The Wiggies", she was simply the local news reporter. Her role expanded as the seasons progressed, becoming one of the series' villains.

characters.name: Brain
characters.description: BrainInfoSpeciesRobotic Brain Chalk DrawingGenderFemaleResidenceChalkZoneBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance"Skrawl’s Brain"Last Appearance"Skrawl’s Brain"VoiceLori AlanBrainis a giant robotic brain built bySkrawland theBeanie Boysin "Skrawl’s Brain". Brain is a giant pink brain robot who has wires in her with different body parts of a human such a as ear, a nose, blue eyes, and big pink lips. She lays on top of a giant plate that the Beanie Boys carry her on, as well as a seat on top of her that Skrawls sits on with a control lever. In her human body that Rudy draws for her after she demands him to make her a body, She become a giant human robot. She wears a navy blue full body suit, a green belt, gray boots, and gains a set of blonde hair. After being put in the head of the body, Rudy and Snap rewire her parts in the wrong holes on purpose in order to defeat her. Her eyes are her ears, One eye is her nose, the other eye her right right ear, her mouth is her nose, and her mouth is her left ear.

characters.name: Bully Nerd
characters.description: Bully NerdInfoSpeciesChalk minotaurGenderMale Bully Nerdis a drawing created byRudy Tabootiethat was based on his school bullyReggie Bullnerd. Rudy initially made him to act as a main villain toSnapin his drawings which represented his own dislike of Reggie. After having had enough of Reggie's bullying, Rudy drew Bully Nerd and Snap on the chalkboard for all to see, however the chalk drawings were soon erased by his teacher and given life inChalkZonewhere Bully Nerd would continue to antagonize Snap like in the drawings. bully nerd is the counterpart of "Reggie Bullnerd" but in chalkzone he Appearance as an minotaur wear an red tie around it neck, toso of an man and head of a cow.

characters.name: Camera man
characters.description: Camera man is a unnamed minor villain and Terry‘s news proster helper. name: unknown but called “camera man“ by the fans of the show friends: terry, vinnie and boorat

characters.name: Chalk Dad
characters.description: Chalk Dadis another one ofRudy Tabootie's creations. As his name suggests, Chalk Dad resembles Rudy's father,Joe Tabootie, and his voice also sounds identical to Joe's. His voice also resembles that ofNed FlandersfromThe Simpsons, but in a high-distorted pitch. He is mainly voiced byJess Harnell. Chalk Dad debuted in the eponymousOh Yeah! Cartoonsepisode.

characters.name: Character Guide
characters.description: ChalkZone is primarily comprised of Chalk Created Characters and Humans. Among these are the Dynamic Duo, Rudy Tabootie and Penny Sanchez, who are the only humans who are knowledgeable about Chalkzone, Snap, Biclops, and Queen Rapsheeba. To find out more about these Characters and their personal information, explore the Tabs above next to the Overview

characters.name: Character Guide/Main Antagonists
characters.description:
||Skrawl|One of Rudy's creations that was vandalized by Reggie, he's a evil creature who blames his creator for his ugly appearance and wants to destroy him by stealing his magic chalk and conquering Chalkzone.
|- ||Reggie Bullnerd|A school bully who has a habit of getting Rudy and Penny in trouble by blaming his antics on them.
|- ||Mr. Wilter|A grumpy, irritable teacher who hates Rudy almost as much as he hates cartoons. A strict authoritarian,  he's quick to dole out punishments and failing grades to his students on a regular basis, whether they deserve them or not.
|-

characters.name: Character Guide/Minor Characters
characters.description: Blocky-Blocky is a Minor character that appears first in the episode "Rudy's First Adventure." He is a protagonist and friend of the main characters Snap and Rudy. Bathtub Granny -Bathtub Granny is a neutral character who exists as a Citizen of Chalkzone in the background of many episodes. Biclops-Originally Cyclops, Biclops is a good/neutral character who exists as the guardian of theMagic Chalk Mines. He gained the name "Biclops" after another eye was drawn on his face by Rudy.

characters.name: Rudy Tabootie
characters.description: Rudy TabootieInfoSpeciesHumanGenderMaleOccupationStudentInterestsArtResidencePlainvilleBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance"ChalkZone" (Oh Yeah! Cartoons)"Rudy's First Adventure" (main series)Last Appearance"Let It Blow My Way" (main series)Nicktoons: Attack of the Toybots(cameo as a collectible master model; Nintendo Wii only)VoiceE.G. Daily Rudolph Bartholomew "Rudy" Tabootie[1]is one of the two main protagonists ofChalkZone.  Rudy is creative, level-headed and kind. He is also a pacifist. He is shy and a dreamer yet shown as quite brave.
characters.personality_section: Rudy is creative, level-headed and kind. He is also a pacifist. He is shy and a dreamer yet shown as quite brave.

characters.name: Courtney
characters.description: Courtney Condoris a female chalk condor (vulture) created byPenny Sanchez. She only appeared in the season 2 episode "Chalk Queen".

characters.name: Girl 1
characters.description: Girl 1 is a minor character on theshow. She has no lines. She befriendedTrina. She appears only in "The Crush". Girl 1 is dark-haired. She has pale skin. She wears silver jewelry and a short orange dress.

characters.name: Haha Men
characters.description: "You go an' 'ave fun with da Smooch, little mon!" The Haha Menare chalk versions of a real Caribbean "junkanoo" band of the same name, who are famed for their remake of the song "Who Let the Dogs Out?". They are: Mahaha (voiced by Phil LaMarr), who can telekinetically move things (including people) by singing; Rica (voiced by Ogie Banks), whose drumming can manifest magical musical notes; and Mohaha (voiced by Kevin Michael Richardson), whose magic hair can move and grab things.
